registerError.validationRequired: Please fill in the description and tutee.
registerError.validationMotivosRef: Each reason must have at least 1 linked reference.
registerError.pageSubtitle: Register an incident for analysis and follow-up
registerError.multiRefHint: You can enter multiple references separated by commas
registerError.enterRefsAbove: Enter references above to link to this reason.
registerError.noReasons: No reasons added. Use the buttons above to classify the error type.

createPlan.validationAnalysis: Fill in the root cause analysis (5 Whys).
createPlan.validationActions: Fill in at least one action (immediate, corrective or preventive).
createPlan.validationWhat: Fill in the "What" field and the tutee.
createPlan.rootCauseSubtitle: 5 Whys technique — ask "why" repeatedly until you find the root cause
createPlan.analysis5WhyPlaceholder:
Why did the error occur?
Why did that reason happen?
Why did that second reason happen?
Why did that third reason happen?
Why did that fourth reason happen?

→ Root cause: [answer to the 5th why]
createPlan.analysisHint: Record the chain of causes until reaching the real root cause
createPlan.planActionsSubtitle: Define the three dimensions of error response
createPlan.immediateHint: What was done immediately to contain the error's impact?
createPlan.immediateNote: Containment action — resolves the immediate symptom
createPlan.correctiveHint: What will be done to correct the root cause of the error?
createPlan.correctiveNote: Resolves the root cause identified in the 5 Whys
createPlan.preventiveHint: What will be done to prevent this error from happening again?
createPlan.whatHint: What specific action will be performed?
createPlan.whereHint: Area/process where the action will take place
createPlan.howHint: Detailed step-by-step of how the action will be executed…
